title: 3kg Mechanical Kitchen Scale - Red
features: A traditional kitchen scale featuring zero adjustment for accuracy when weighing. Complete with a deep stainless steel bowl measuring approximately 16cm in diameter and 3cm deep, ideal for measuring out a variety of ingredients such as butter, flour, sugar and much more.
The mechanical scales can weigh up to 3kg in weight and display the weights in both grams and kilograms to ensure easy reading of measurements.
The precision mechanism of the scale makes baking and cooking a simple task, ensuring perfect recipes every time. A must have accessory for any kitchen.
